_comment: Endpoints for the CModel local fleet on CHost. Loopback URL is for CHost-side callers; tailnet URL is for laptop / any other Tailscale-connected node. Port 11434 is exposed by setting User env var OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434 and inbound firewall rule 'Augment-Ollama-Tailscale' (scope 100.64.0.0/10).
batchingLaw: All writer calls first, then all retriever calls. Never interleave - CHost can only hold one CModel member resident at a time. keep_alive=24h is mandatory on every call.
